task: READ-ONLY review of the new Apple-like two-layer Quickshell central content transition. Inspect current Bar.qml and StatusData.qml plus AppLauncher/UpdateSelector. Requirements: source and destination content coexist during the 280ms container morph; source exits subtly, destination enters subtly; source-aware vertical direction; same-height transitions crossfade without vertical motion; per-monitor mapping and cleanup remain correct; no bounce. Check QML bindings, opacity/offset math, disabled-but-visible source behavior, transaction metadata, app query preservation, rapid transitions, clipping, and regressions. Do not edit. Report blockers/medium issues with exact lines, or CLEAN.

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable
Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

criteriaSatisfied.evidence: Blocker identified at StatusData.qml:497-515 and Bar.qml:270-278; verified ordinary opacity, direction, monitor mapping, query preservation, clipping, and no-bounce behavior.

commandsRun.command: git status --short; git diff; git diff --stat
commandsRun.summary: Inspected repository state and relevant changes read-only.
Inspected current QML implementations with exact line numbers.

commandsRun.command: grep component implicit sizes and overlay call sites
commandsRun.summary: Confirmed equal-height components are 36px and reviewed monitor-aware call paths.

validationOutput: Ordinary transitions use coexisting instantiated layers and a 280ms OutCubic container morph.
Rapid same-mode or mode-changing retriggers reset content opacity/offset state and can visibly snap.
residualRisks: No live Quickshell visual test or QML lint run.
Monitor removal during an active transition was not runtime-tested.
childReport.diffSummary: Read-only review of the new central morph transaction metadata and two-layer transition implementation.
reviewFindings: blocker: home_manager/hyprland/quickshell/top-bar/Bar.qml:270-278 and StatusData.qml:497-515 - rapid or repeated transitions reset animation progress from logical modes, causing opacity/offset snaps and loss of rendered source continuity
childReport.manualNotes: Repository already contained staged and unstaged changes; this review made no edits.
